## RPC contract

| RPC | gRPC | REST |
|-----|------|------|
| InternalUserService/Get | (GetUserRequest) → User | — |
| InternalUserService/OnRecoveryCompleted | (OnRecoveryCompletedRequest) → operation.Operation | — |
| InternalUserService/UpsertFromIdentity | (UpsertFromIdentityRequest) → operation.Operation | — |
| UserService/Delete | (DeleteUserRequest) → operation.Operation | DELETE /iam/v1/users/{user_id} |
| UserService/Get | (GetUserRequest) → User | GET /iam/v1/users/{user_id} |
| UserService/Invite | (InviteUserRequest) → operation.Operation | POST /iam/v1/users:invite |
| UserService/List | (ListUsersRequest) → ListUsersResponse | GET /iam/v1/users |
